hero.title: AI for HVAC Businesses
hero.description: Your AI virtual assistant helps HVAC businesses manage calls, book installations and repairs, capture service details, send reminders, and follow up with customers — so your team stays focused on the job.

stats.label: Fewer missed service calls with 24/7 answering.
Reduction in time spent on scheduling and follow-ups.
Higher job bookings with faster response times.

intro.title: AI Virtual Receptionist for HVAC Businesses

blocks.heading: Modern Solutions for Modern HVAC Teams
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that every call to your HVAC business could be an urgent repair, a new installation, or a maintenance request. Our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every enquiry is answered promptly and professionally.

blocks.heading: Focus on Service, Not Phone Calls
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist handles incoming calls, customer questions, and appointment bookings while your technicians are on-site. It answers questions like 'Can I book an AC repair?', 'Do you install new air conditioners?', or 'Do you service heating systems?' with clarity and confidence.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Service Request
blocks.description: Whether your team is busy, after hours, or during peak seasons, your AI Receptionist captures every call. It explains your services — from air conditioning and heating to ventilation and maintenance — and books jobs automatically.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Improve efficiency, capture more service calls, and deliver better customer experiences with AI-powered automation.

whyChooseUs.title: Why HVAC Businesses Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: HVAC companies across Australia trust our AI Virtual Receptionist to manage calls, schedule jobs, and capture accurate service information. It integrates with your scheduling tools and CRM, acting as a reliable extension of your team.

card.heading: Streamline Service Follow-Ups and Communication
card.description: After each service call, technicians can record quick voice notes that are transcribed and summarised automatically. The AI also sends reminders for maintenance, follow-ups, and future service visits.
